entities.name: V
entities.context: Owner of the knowledge system containing these principles

entities.name: P1 - Human-Readable First
entities.context: Principle: Write for humans, derive machine formats

entities.name: P2 - Single Source of Truth
entities.context: Principle: Each fact lives in one place

entities.name: P15 - Complete Before Claiming
entities.context: Principle: Report honest progress - marked as most critical

entities.name: P27 - Nemawashi
entities.context: Principle: Explore 2-3 alternatives before committing; Japanese consensus-building concept

entities.name: P32 - Simple Over Easy
entities.context: Principle: Choose few concepts over convenient abstractions

entities.name: P36 - Orchestration
entities.context: Principle: Use multiple personas for complex work

entities.name: Essential Principles
entities.context: Top 10 foundational principles in V's knowledge system

entities.name: Multiple Personas
entities.context: Technique for handling complex work referenced in P36

relationships.context: Core principle ranked #6, marked most critical
Orchestration principle implements multiple personas for complex work
Both principles concern cautious, reversible operations
Both principles emphasize clarity and self-contained communication
